name: generate_only_representative_recent_prompt
description: Representative prompt stays generate-only with the default fake provider and public sample Target.

name: representative_count_prompt_uses_count_example
description: Representative aggregation prompt receives bundled count-by-dimension guidance without external calls.

want.query:
search 'count storm events by state'
| take 10

name: target_alias_resolves_from_catalog
description: Target Catalog alias resolves exactly one public sample Target before generation.

name: missing_target_fails_before_agent
description: Missing Target fails before schema discovery, model/provider generation, or Kusto calls.

name: ambiguous_targets_fail_before_agent
description: Multiple configured Targets require explicit selection and are not inferred from prompt text.

name: schema_only_disclosure_strips_sample_rows
description: Default disclosure sends schema/docstrings but strips sample rows from provider input and output.

name: sample_rows_disclosure_requires_opt_in
description: Sample-row disclosure is explicit and recorded when requested.

name: management_command_refused_by_validation
description: A provider-produced management command is not execution-eligible for ask.

validation_errors_contain: must not be a management command

name: unbounded_query_blocks_execution_gate
description: Execution Gate remains blocked when validation reports an unbounded row-returning draft.

name: execution_gate_success_uses_readonly_and_row_cap
description: Execution Gate executes only a safe bounded Query Draft with read-only request properties and max-row cap.

name: configured_shots_are_filtered_offline
description: Configured shots are retrieved read-only, unsafe rows are skipped, and bundled examples remain available.

shots_rows.name: safe_count
shots_rows.query: StormEvents | summarize EventCount = count() by State | top 10 by EventCount desc

shots_rows.name: unsafe_write
shots_rows.intent: Unsafe example that must be skipped.
